title: Humolp's hammers
description: A Simple mod which adds your favorite 3x3 Mining Hammers!
body:
**Humolp’s Hammers adds a new tool to the game - A Minehammer!**

Minehammers come in four variants: Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite.
They can break blocks in a 3×3 area at once, making them perfect for clearing large sections quickly.

To keep things balanced, mined blocks do not drop any items — these tools are meant for digging, not resource farming ;) 

_Each variant has its own crafting recipe, and the Netherite Minehammer is obtained via the Smithing Table using the Netherite Upgrade Template._
